guide.title: How to Generate Reports
guide.description: Generate comprehensive PDF reports for your completed sessions with AI-powered analysis.
guide.step1: Complete a session with analysis enabled
guide.step2: Navigate to the session detail page
guide.step3: Click 'Generate Report' button to create your PDF
